ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Feb-05-2014 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Dec-11-2013 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of First And Final Account And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-13-2013 Continued To Dec-11-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch.

Ms. Der requested a continuance stating that the IRS matter was cleared up and that they have the petition finalizing the account drafted. Status of the first and final account was continued to December 11, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of First And Final Account And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-02-2013 Continued To Nov-13-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch.

Mr. Der requested a continuance stating that there are still some accounting issues regarding rents and an investigation from the Internal Revenue Service for $15,000.00 plus for Mr. Keegan. Status on filing of a First and Final Account and Petition for Final Distribution was continued to November 13, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
